old_value: {"id":"broadside-d74n.1","title":"WebFinger: return 404 not 400 for non-acct: URIs","description":"Per RFC 7033, WebFinger queries with non-acct: schemes (https:, mailto:) must get 404 Not Found, not 400 Bad Request. FediTest catches this. Check Broadside's WebFinger handler.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:12.582881485Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:12.582881485Z","labels":["smallhold-audit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-d74n.1","depends_on_id":"broadside-d74n","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:39:12.604841298Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"CONFIRMED: src/server.rs:256 returns StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST for non-acct: URIs. Fix: change to StatusCode::NOT_FOUND and update error message to 'resource not found'. Also add integration test for non-acct: URI expecting 404."}
Fixed: src/server.rs:256 now returns 404 Not Found instead of 400 Bad Request for non-acct: URI schemes. Added integration test test_webfinger_non_acct_uri. All 13 tests passing.
